releases.introduction: Tool result retrieval is now more robust. Chunks dynamically size based on model context window, ultra-long lines wrap before persisting, and fuzzy matching recovers results from IDs with minor typos.

bugfixes.description: Tool result data now dynamically sizes retrieval chunks based on model context window, ensuring large results remain accessible even with smaller context models.
bugfixes.title: Fixed Tool Result Retrieval for Small Context Models

bugfixes.description: Ultra-long lines in tool results now wrap before persisting, preventing database errors when processing content like long URLs or code with minimal line breaks.
bugfixes.title: Fixed Database Errors from Long Lines
Improved Tool Result Recovery
bugfixes.description: Tool result IDs with typos now fuzzy-match using Levenshtein distance, recovering results that would have failed with minor spelling mistakes.

releases.introduction: Tool calling now works across all providers. A shared request builder ensures every OpenAI-compatible provider sends tool definitions and preserves tool state correctly, so agents can search the web, read files, and use all MCP tools regardless of which provider or model you choose.

improvements.description: OpenAI, DeepSeek, Ollama Cloud, OpenRouter, and Z.AI now properly send tool definitions and preserve tool call history in multi-turn conversations. Previously, these providers stripped messages down to just role and content, making tool calls impossible regardless of what the system prompt asked for.
improvements.title: Tool Calling for All Providers

releases.introduction: System prompt is now fully cacheable - dynamic content like date, time, user info, and location are now in the userContext block, enabling better KV cache reuse. Weather tool also gets precise GPS coordinates when available.

bugfixes.title: Fixed Coordinates Not Persisting
bugfixes.description: Precise location coordinates now persist correctly to UserDefaults, ensuring they're available even after app restart.

improvements.description: When precise location is enabled, GPS coordinates are now included in userContext. Weather tool uses these directly instead of geocoding, providing more accurate weather data for your exact location.
improvements.title: Precise Coordinates for Weather

improvements.description: Date/time, user name, language, location, and conversation ID have been consolidated into a single userContext block in every user message. This keeps the system prompt identical across messages, enabling KV cache prefix reuse for faster inference.
improvements.title: Unified userContext Block

improvements.description: Weather tool description updated to clearly guide agents on using coordinates from userContext, with fallback to training data or city name format.
improvements.title: Weather Tool Improvements
